name: 𝓢𝓸𝓶𝓷𝓪𝓽𝓱 𝓢𝓲𝓷𝓰𝓱
title: AI & Data Science Student | IIT-J
bio: Being an AI and Data Science student at 𝕀𝕀𝕋 𝕁 with a strong interest in building intelligent systems and data-driven solutions. My experience spans IoT-based projects, applied machine learning, API development, and ethical cybersecurity practices. I enjoy working at the intersection of hardware, software, and data, with a constant focus on learning, experimentation, and real-world problem solving.

projects.title: ROJECT CIPHER: Enhanced clue ZENO
projects.description: (LOCKED)Enhanced Hacker ZENO is an interactive web-based cryptography challenge platform designed to teach encryption and decryption concepts through hands-on puzzles. It includes classical and modern ciphers like Caesar Cipher, RSA, and hash cracking, presented in a hacker-themed interface to make learning engaging and practical.

Successfully completed an internship at the Indian Space Academy, where I developed a Land Use Land Cover (LULC) classification project for the Delhi NCR region using satellite imagery and geospatial analysis techniques, and fulfilled all project objectives within the stipulated time period.
